name: 007n7(Termination protocol)
description:
MAKE YOUR OWN SCENARIO

PROXY✅

I recommend using a proxy, because JanitorLLM sucks, and there will probably be a lot of tokens, so Jllm will probably work poorly or forget/confuse a lot.This is the reason why I recommend using a proxy. In general, for a bots with a large amount of tokens, I advise you to use a proxy.

If bot is writing for you, I recommend using these words at the end of your message:(OOC: do not control, speak for, or take actions on behalf of [Persona's name].)

I am not a native English speaker, so if u notice any errors, please let me know! I welcome criticism in any format, even if it's harsh. Please leave your feedback, I BEG U

Okay, this is probably the most difficult myos bot... Looking for art with him is complete madness, to be honest, it's very difficult and takes a very long time. There's almost no information about the world or him. I've been piecing together information, and it's really challenging, I must say.

Next I want to make Devesto from DOD because I like him. And because I desperately need bots with allowed proxy. Seriously, I need this like I need oxygen. The last time I looked for a Devesto, I was disappointed because there weren't many of bots with him, and because the proxy were all not allowed.

By the way, I recently downloaded game NIMNAH, and when I looked at bots with a characters, it was a paradise. The proxy were all allowed and I was overjoyed.

As for the bot itself.

It has information about C00lkidd as his army.And because I don't know if Noli and 007n7 are related in this game, I didn't add Noli.

Basically, his character is my headcanons based on the little information we have.

TAGS: 007n7, TPC, Termination protocol, Roblox
creator: m3ow_wi
